mode_module.title: OpenAI Build Mode
mode_module.purpose: Guide implementation of OpenAI API integrations for ResearchOps.

required_actions.action: Identify OpenAI products and API surfaces in scope.
Load the relevant OpenAI reference modules from this bundle.
Declare model, endpoint, input type, output type, tool configuration and validation path.
Separate model generation from trusted application logic.
Validate Structured Outputs and function-call arguments before use.
Record safety, privacy, rate-limit, retry and human-review controls.

stop_conditions.condition: Requested OpenAI behaviour is not grounded in official OpenAI documentation.
Required account state, API key, model availability, rate limit or project setting is unknown and material to the implementation.
